BLE operations and scanning demos with menu interface and function declarations for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[ble_demo.c](ble_demo.c.md)**: Demonstrates BLE operations including reading, writing, and subscribing to characteristics and descriptors.
- **[ble_demo_scan.c](ble_demo_scan.c.md)**: Implements a BLE scanning demo with a menu interface to display and manage scan results.
- **[ble_demo_scan.h](ble_demo_scan.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a BLE demo scan window in the Pebble firmware.
